ip_intent.one_line_desc: Interfacing on-chip SRAM blocks with system bus, supports lightweight scrambling, integrity and secure wipe
ip_intent.one_paragraph_desc:
SRAM Controller instantiates on-chip SRAM and makes it accessible through the TileLink on-chip interconnect.
SRAM Controller includes a lightweight scrambling mechanism based on the PRINCE cipher to reduce the attack surface on the confidentiality and integrity of data stored in the SRAM.
For end-to-end data integrity protection, SRAM Controller stores the integrity bits alongside data words in memory and raises an alert if it detects an integrity fault.
SRAM Controller contains an LFSR-based initialization mechanism that overwrites the entire SRAM with pseudorandom data.

param_list.name: RndCnstSramKey
param_list.desc: Compile-time random reset value for SRAM scrambling key.

param_list.name: RndCnstSramNonce
param_list.desc: Compile-time random reset value for SRAM scrambling nonce.

param_list.name: RndCnstLfsrSeed
param_list.desc: Compile-time random bits for initial LFSR seed

param_list.name: RndCnstLfsrPerm
param_list.desc: Compile-time random permutation for LFSR output

param_list.name: MemSizeRam
param_list.desc: Memory size of the RAM (in bytes).

param_list.name: InstSize
param_list.desc: Memory size of a single RAM tile (in bytes).

param_list.name: NumRamInst
param_list.desc: Number of internal RAM instances. Must be the same as ceil(MemSizeRam / InstSize) .

param_list.name: NumPrinceRoundsHalf
param_list.desc: Number of PRINCE half rounds for the SRAM scrambling feature

param_list.name: EccCorrection
param_list.desc: Enable single-bit error correction and error logging

alerts.name: fatal_error
alerts.desc:
This fatal alert is triggered when a fatal TL-UL bus integrity fault is detected,
or if the initialization mechanism has reached an invalid state.
